resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform
job_details:
About the job
About AI Paralegal - Pathways


AI Paralegal - Pathways is a member of the ATI group of companies - the leading provider of Legal Practice Management Solutions in the world. Over a 30-year period we've expanded across Australia, Canada, the United States, the United Kingdom, the Republic of Ireland, Poland and New Zealand and support more than 70,000 lawyers and their staff in small and medium sized law firms. We owe our success to our curiosity and commitment to our guiding purpose, to ‘Help lawyers who help people'.

Pathways is part of LEAP's next generation of AI initiatives - focused on helping law firms manage matters with greater confidence, consistency, and efficiency. Built on decades of legal domain knowledge and real-world workflows, Pathways turns legal expertise into practical, step-by-step guidance and suggestions embedded directly into LEAP.

Legal work follows patterns. Matters progress through familiar stages, whether it's family law, conveyancing, or another practice area. But today, lawyers and support staff still rely heavily on memory, checklists, and experience to know what should happen next. Steps can be missed, work can be delayed, and best practice can vary from person to person.

This is the problem that Pathways is here to solve.

Pathways powerfully combines structured legal workflows with AI-driven decision support. It draws on existing AI tools alongside deep legal expertise to provide suggestions that are practical, relevant, and grounded in how law firms actually operate.

Pathways is not about replacing lawyers or rigidly enforcing processes. It's about supporting legal professionals with intelligent guidance, helping them work more efficiently, adapt to change, and deliver better outcomes for their clients.


What You'll Do


As a Senior Full Stack Engineer, you'll join a small, high-trust team taking an AI capability from Proof of Concept into a production-ready feature embedded directly into LEAP. You'll work closely with legal experts and the AI Paralegal group to turn real legal workflows into smart, practical suggestions that support lawyers through the lifecycle of a matter.

You'll be hands-on across the stack, shaping core architecture, building and iterating on features, and embedding the capability into LEAP based on direct client feedback. This is not a role with fixed specs or a linear roadmap - you'll help define what gets built, test ideas with customers, and adapt quickly as insights emerge.

This is a high-impact role for someone who enjoys early-stage problem solving, thrives in changing environments, and wants real ownership over what they build. You'll have the freedom to experiment, influence direction, and help shape a foundational part of LEAP's future AI platform.

If you're excited by ambiguity, curious about applying AI in meaningful ways, and motivated by building products customers actually use, this role is for you.


To make this happen, you will:


Write production code across the full stack - from AI agent orchestration to frontend UI
Contribute to architecture and technology decisions - including which AI agent frameworks to use
Work directly with customers and legal experts to understand workflows and build solutions that actually help
Partner with product and design to define features and user experiences
Build prototypes quickly, iterate based on feedback, and ship features that deliver real value
Navigate ambiguity and uncertainty with confidence - this is early-stage, fast-moving work
Set high standards for code quality and help establish engineering best practices


What You'll Bring


You'll need 5+ years of commercial experience in full-stack web development, along with:

Front End: JavaScript, TypeScript, React or similar 
Backend: Strong knowledge of database systems and data modelling, as well as at least one backend language or platform
AI/Agents: Curiosity and willingness to work with emerging AI agent frameworks 
You can contribute towards software architecture and make thoughtful design decisions in an evolving, uncertain environment
You know what good looks like when building great software products from scratch


You Are The Type Of Person Who


Thrives in ambiguity and early-stage environments. You're comfortable making decisions with incomplete information and iterating based on feedback
Thinks about the user with every technical decision. You talk to customers, understand their workflows, and build solutions that actually solve problems
Writes pragmatic and simple code that achieves the desired commercial outcome. You understand the trade-offs between quality and velocity and strike the right balance for an early-stage product
Asks questions relentlessly. You're hungry to understand the "why" behind what we're building and challenge assumptions when needed
Is clear and concise in verbal and written communication
Believes they can build world-class legal AI. You're excited by the challenge of creating genuinely intelligent, proactive software that transforms how lawyers work
Wants the startup experience without the financial risk. You want to build something from zero with autonomy and ownership, backed by real resources

LEAP is an inclusive, people-first company committed to breaking down institutional barriers that keep people from reaching their potential. If you meet some, but not all the requirements above, we encourage you to still submit your application.


Why join LEAP?


Lightning-in-a-bottle opportunity. Ground-floor, founding team role building a new product with massive potential. All the excitement of a startup with the budget and de-risking of a global company
Shape the product and stack. It's early days - you'll make real decisions about what we build and how we build it, including our AI agent framework and architecture choices
Your work matters. We're building AI that will transform how lawyers run their businesses and serve their clients
World-class legal AI. Access to 30+ years of legal domain expertise, proprietary content and playbooks from LEAP and Infotrack, and the resources to build something truly exceptional
Backed by ATI Group. Part of a successful global company in the legal software sector. You get startup autonomy with enterprise stability, funding, and an engaged client base of 100,000+ legal professionals
Flexible and hybrid working. We'd like to find this person in Sydney, but we want you to work in a way that suits you
Grow with us. As an early team member member, you'll have opportunities to grow into leadership roles as the team and product scale. Our founder Christian Beck has been building legal tech businesses for over 30 years and knows how to scale companies
Have fun with us. Celebrations. Socials. Sports teams. Access to sailing and yacht events. 
Access to LEAP Home - a program unique to LEAP to support you in buying your primary residence
Your well-being matters - enjoy an additional paid wellbeing day every year, free platinum Fitness First gym membership and weekly massages in the office. Plus catered lunch and breakfast every week, and a professional barista
Modern, evolving tech stack. Built on serverless frameworks and modern tools: React, Next.js, Drizzle, Neon PostgreSQL, deployed on Vercel. We're evaluating AI agent frameworks and other emerging technologies - you'll help decide what we use
prompt:
Answer these employer screening questions professionally and honestly based on the provided resume.
For multiple choice questions, select the most appropriate option that matches the candidate's experience.
For text questions, provide clear, concise answers (1-2 sentences).
Be truthful - if the candidate doesn't have a specific qualification, indicate that politely while highlighting related experience.
